author: sergeevii123
name: Unigram-prior output bias on PR #1855 LQER + 9-hparam stack base
blurb: Adds a fixed (vocab_size,) bias to output logits, initialized to log p(token) computed from the first training shard with Laplace smoothing. Bias is a non-trainable buffer added inside _project_logits + forward_ttt, before logit_softcap. Disabled (UNIGRAM_PRIOR_ENABLED=0) is bit-identical to PR #1855. Hypothesis: model starts from unigram distribution at step 0, frees gradient capacity for learning higher-order structure inside the 600s budget. Built on PR #1855 (codemath3000, 1.06108 BPB, current main frontier).
base: PR #1855 (2026-04-27): 11L XSA + LQER + SparseAttnGate + BOS-fixed SmearGate + PolarNS Muon + 9-hparam stack, 3-seed mean 1.06108
technique_summary: PR #1855 base + unigram-prior output bias. New env vars: UNIGRAM_PRIOR_ENABLED, UNIGRAM_PRIOR_SHARDS. Patch: 4 surgical edits — Hyperparameters block, GPT.__init__ (register fp32 buffer, persistent), _project_logits (pre-softcap add), forward_ttt inline logits (post-LoRA, pre-softcap add), train_model (compute log p from first N CaseOps shards, Laplace+1, copy into buffer). Buffer (8192 elements) hits GPTQ fp16 passthrough branch — round-trip clean.
